commands.review_summary:
The branch converts plugin registry, configured plugin install, and legacy plugin manifest Doctor repairs to structured health-check outputs while preserving their positional repair slots.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a structured Doctor repair conversion PR, not a bug report. The useful check is source/contract review plus current-head real `openclaw doctor` CLI proof.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer-labeled stacked PR needs human contract and landing-order review, current-head real behavior proof, and the dry-run preview fix before merge.

target.title: Doctor: continue structured repair conversion
target.body:
## Summary

This continues the doctor repair migration by moving plugin registry, configured plugin install, and legacy plugin manifest repairs onto the internal structured health-check runner.

The PR keeps the public health/plugin SDK surface unchanged. The new checks still run at the existing doctor positions for compatibility, while `doctor --lint`, dry-run previews, diffs, effects, and targeted structured repair can all use the same check results.

The broad structured repair bridge now skips these positional plugin repairs so `openclaw doctor --fix` does not rerun registry/configured-plugin work later in the same pass. It also avoids passing the presentation note sink through that broad pass, so existing doctor note contributions do not duplicate their output.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-plugin-manifests.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-manifests.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts src/flows/health-checks.ts src/flows/health-check-runner-types.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor-plugin-manifests.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-manifests.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts src/flows/health-checks.ts src/flows/health-check-runner-types.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-plugin-manifests.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot` (5 files, 80 tests passed)
- `codex review --base fork/doctor-core-run-contract-migration` (clean after accepting findings for duplicate positional repairs, duplicate note emission, and async note sink ordering)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: plugin registry/configured-plugin/legacy-manifest doctor repairs now expose structured findings, dry-run/diff/effect data, and repair results while preserving their existing doctor ordering.
Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu 24.04, durable OpenClaw worktree `/root/src/openclaw-84290-doctor-next`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-plugin-manifests.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot`.
Evidence after fix: 5 test files passed with 80 tests; core and core-test tsgo lanes passed; oxfmt, oxlint, and git diff checks passed; Codex review found no actionable defects.
Observed result after fix: positional plugin repairs are filtered out of the broad structured repair pass, so they do not run twice during normal doctor repair, and presentation-note sinks are not passed through the broad pass.
What was not tested: full repository check suite and live plugin installation against external registries.
